title: Worker Perceptions of Job Insecurity in the Mid-1990s: Evidence from the Survey of Economic Expectations
search_query: Worker Perceptions of Job Insecurity in the Mid-1990s: Evidence from the Survey of Economic Expectations
notes: This paper analyzes the probabilistic measures of job insecurity that have recently become available through the nationwide Survey of Economic Expectations (SEE). Since 1994, employed SEE respondents have been asked questions eliciting their subjective probabilities of job loss i...
